comment: THE ROUTING TRUTH (Studio W2). Model ids + lane order live HERE; the api/* functions inline the same values (D22 forbids cross-file imports in serverless), and tests/routing-config.test.ts FAILS if any function drifts from this file. Swapping a 2028 model = edit this file, sync the named constants, gates go green.

notes.guru: Streaming SSE — Groq-only by constraint (Gemini streaming speaks a different wire protocol); keyless fallback is the deterministic router. Revisit when a free OpenAI-compatible streaming Gemini endpoint exists.
notes.pinned: Ids are PINNED (D144): -latest aliases jump models under a schema. gemini-3-flash-preview is a preview id — the Law-12 session-start check owns its rotation.
